growthcleanr 2.99.0

Remove implausible weight values using 7-step moderate EWMA flow.

Source: R/adult_support.R
remove_mod_ewma_wt.Rd

Remove implausible weight values using 7-step moderate EWMA flow.

remove_mod_ewma_wt(
  full_inc_df,
  exc_label = "Exclude-A-Traj-Moderate",
  max_rounds = 100,
  wtallow_formula = "piecewise",
  ewma_window = 15,
  mod_ewma_f = 0.75,
  perclimit_low = 0.5,
  perclimit_mid = 0.4,
  perclimit_high = 0,
  endpair_gap_days = 90
)

Arguments

full_inc_df

Data frame for one subject with columns: id, age_days, ageyears, meas_m (weight in kg). Must have >= 3 rows.

exc_label

Character prefix for exclusion codes

max_rounds

Maximum number of rounds (default 100)

wtallow_formula

Formula for wtallow ("piecewise", "piecewise-lower", "allofus15")

endpair_gap_days

Max within-pair age gap (days) for the end-pair median guard (default 90).

Value

Named character vector: id -> exclusion code for excluded values.

Contents

Developed by Carrie Daymont, Robert Grundmeier, Jeffrey Miller, Diego Campos, Dan Chudnov, Hannah De los Santos.
